SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2025 VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS RYLAN LORANCE AND TREVOR RING ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHELLE WHITE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LORANCE, RYLAN RING, TREVOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, MICHELLE $1,093.98 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,193.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
